header.title: Cast Your Vote
header.subtitle: Welcome, {name}. Your code has been verified and you're ready to vote.

agreement.section_subtitle: Review the agreement before submitting your vote
agreement.intro_text: By submitting this vote, you confirm that:
agreement.condition_1: You have selected the candidates of your choice accurately
agreement.condition_2: You understand this is a binding vote
agreement.condition_3: You have read and accepted all voting rules and regulations
agreement.condition_4: You will not attempt to change or retract this vote after submission
agreement.checkbox_label: I Confirm and Accept the Terms
agreement.checkbox_description: I agree to the terms and conditions above and confirm that my vote selections are accurate and final.
agreement.ready_message: You're ready to submit your vote!

submit.button_aria_enabled: Submit your vote - all selections complete
submit.button_aria_disabled: Complete all selections to submit your vote

security.title: Your Vote is Secure
security.description: Your selections are encrypted and protected with the highest security standards.

time.title: Take Your Time
time.description: You have sufficient time to review and confirm your selections before submitting.

help.title: Need Help?
help.description: If you have questions, contact the election support team for assistance.

aria_labels.page_loaded: Voting page loaded. Ready to cast your vote.
aria_labels.main_content: Voting form - Select candidates for available positions
aria_labels.voting_form: Voting form - Select and confirm your candidates
aria_labels.checkbox_checked: Agreement checkbox confirmed. You may now submit your vote.

candidate_selection.all_required: You must select all candidates for this position
candidate_selection.instruction: Please select {number} candidate(s) for the position of {position}
candidate_selection.instruction_nepali: Please select {number} candidate(s) for the position of {position}
candidate_selection.status_no_vote: You chose not to vote for this position
candidate_selection.status_empty: No candidates selected - select one or skip this position
candidate_selection.skip_description: Click here if you do not wish to vote for any candidate in this position. You can still vote for other positions.
candidate_selection.skip_description_nepali: Click here if you do not wish to vote for any candidate in this position. You can still vote for other positions.
candidate_selection.skip_confirmation: You have chosen not to vote for {position}
candidate_selection.skip_instruction: You can change this decision by unchecking this box and selecting candidates
